hero.subtitle: The only tutor that speaks your language: Code. Learn verb tenses and technical vocabulary by simulating real developer situations.

ready.title: Ready to level up?
ready.desc: Interested? Let's start this journey right now and transform the way you learn programming and English.

context.title: Contextual Translation
context.desc: Don't know what that variable means? Hover over the code and get the exact translation in a programming context.

sections.about_desc: We were born from the frustration of seeing brilliant developers limited by the language barrier. Our AI doesn't teach you how to order pizza; it teaches you how to explain why the server went down or how to deploy a complex query.
sections.about_item4: Vocabulary focused on documentation and agile meetings
sections.contact_subtitle: Our support team is ready to help you unlock your international career.

footer.desc: Evolving the way developers learn English, connecting code and language in a single experience.
footer.rights: © 2026 AI English Tutor. All rights reserved.

auth.review_text: Review your data before completing your account creation. If something is wrong, just click 'Back'.
auth.email_warning_text: This email address is already in use. Please try another one.

tutor.welcome_title: Hi! I'm your English Tutor for Devs. 🧠
tutor.welcome_desc: I'm here to help you master technical vocabulary, review your corporate emails, or prepare you for interviews in English. How can I help you today?
tutor.suggestion_1_desc: Help me write an email explaining a bug in production.
tutor.suggestion_2_desc: Simulate an interview asking me about React in English.
tutor.suggestion_3_desc: How do I explain what a REST API does to a foreign client?
tutor.input_placeholder: Type your code or English question here...
